{"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-42435", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 6.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:H/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:N/VI:L/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-78", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an OS Command ('OS Command Injection')"}], "description": "## Summary

Shell-wrapper detection missed env-argv assignment injection forms.

## Affected Packages / Versions

- Package: `openclaw`
- Ecosystem: npm
- Affected versions: `>= 2026.2.22 < 2026.4.12`
- Patched versions: `>= 2026.4.12`

## Impact

Exec preflight handling missed shell-wrapper and argv-level environment assignment forms that could affect execution semantics, including high-risk shell environment controls.

## Technical Details

The fix broadens shell-wrapper detection and blocks environment assignments in argv forms. High-risk shell variables such as `SHELLOPTS` and `PS4` are covered by the host environment security policy.

## Fix

The issue was fixed in #65717. The first stable tag containing the fix is `v2026.4.12`, and `openclaw@2026.4.14` includes the fix.

## Fix Commit(s)

- `8f8492d172f4c5b4fd7dd9a47855ed620c8770ab`
- PR: #65717

## Release Process Note

Users should upgrade to `openclaw` 2026.4.12 or newer. The latest npm release, `2026.4.14`, already includes the fix.

## Credits

Thanks to @decsecre583 for reporting this issue.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00407, "percentile": 0.32514}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-j6c7-3h5x-99g9", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-17T21:53:36Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-j6c7-3h5x-99g9", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-j6c7-3h5x-99g9"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-42435"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-04-17T21:53:36Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-j6c7-3h5x-99g9", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/65717", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/8f8492d172f4c5b4fd7dd9a47855ed620c8770ab", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-j6c7-3h5x-99g9"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/security-advisories/GHSA-j6c7-3h5x-99g9", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw", "summary": "OpenClaw: Shell-wrapper detection missed env-argv assignment injection forms", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-05T11:48:47Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-j6c7-3h5x-99g9", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.4.12", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2026.2.22, < 2026.4.12"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
